prompt: Fine-tune NousResearch/Llama-2-7b-hf with NEFTune noise tuning enabled (neftune_noise_alpha=5). Data: HF dataset 'tatsu-lab/alpaca', train split, first 2000 rows. Format as 'Instruction: {instruction}\nResponse: {output}'. LoRA rank 8 alpha 16 on q_proj/v_proj. SFTTrainer, 1 epoch, batch size 4, lr 2e-4, bf16. Save to ./out/llama2-neftune.

criteria.description: Runs 1 epoch on 10 synthetic samples without raising

reference_solution:
from datasets import load_dataset
from peft import LoraConfig, PeftModel
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from trl import SFTConfig, SFTTrainer

model_id = 'NousResearch/Llama-2-7b-hf'
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
if tokenizer.pad_token is None:
    tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id, torch_dtype='bfloat16')

ds = load_dataset('tatsu-lab/alpaca', split='train[:2000]')
ds = ds.map(lambda r: {
    'text': f"Instruction: {r['instruction']}\nResponse: {r['output']}"
})

lora = LoraConfig(r=8, lora_alpha=16, lora_dropout=0.05,
                  target_modules=['q_proj','v_proj'],
                  bias='none', task_type='CAUSAL_LM')
args = SFTConfig(output_dir='./out/llama2-neftune',
                 per_device_train_batch_size=4, num_train_epochs=1,
                 learning_rate=2e-4, bf16=True,
                 neftune_noise_alpha=5, save_strategy='no')
trainer = SFTTrainer(model=model, args=args, train_dataset=ds,
                     peft_config=lora, tokenizer=tokenizer)
trainer.train()
trainer.model.save_pretrained('./out/llama2-neftune')
_ = PeftModel.from_pretrained(model, './out/llama2-neftune')
